title: Claim
description: An assertion, citing the evidence and assumptions it rests on. Field names here match the actual ClaimCreated runtime payload (src/cli.js claimCreate, src/validator.js validateClaimCreated), not the older snake_case shape (content/claim_type/confidence_score/author_participant_id) this file previously described. There is no claim_type enum in the runtime -- claims are not typed. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
